scope: ignored live Microsoft 365 probes for #624 Agent PendingAction confirmation

token_handling.transport: temporary 0600 /tmp token file passed through ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN_FILE
token_handling.cleanup: temporary token file removed after local test run
token_handling.evidence_policy: no token value, account identifier, raw Graph object identifier, share URL, OAuth query string, or raw body content is recorded

proof: TestProviderScript emitted a destructive live-write create_draft action.
Public tool_call input was redacted before PendingAction registration and did not contain recipient or body sentinel.
AgentHandler::confirm executed through DesktopAgentOperations with a real Microsoft Graph Mail.ReadWrite token.
Graph returned a draft id through the confirmed result summary.
Drop cleanup deleted the created draft through GraphClient::delete_message.
Test created a temporary OneDrive fixture file using conflictBehavior=fail.
TestProviderScript emitted a destructive share link action for the fixture item.
Public tool_call input was redacted and retained only non-sensitive link metadata.
AgentHandler::confirm executed through DesktopAgentOperations and the existing share handler path with a real Files.ReadWrite token.
Graph permission listing found a direct, non-inherited anonymous view link.
Drop cleanup deleted the created permission and temporary OneDrive item.
TestProviderScript emitted a destructive backup action.
Public tool_call input was redacted before PendingAction registration.
AgentHandler::confirm executed through DesktopAgentOperations.
The shared backup runner performed a real mail refresh using cached token material seeded from the live token.
The Store run log contained a backup run with ok status.
Test seeded a synthetic archived mail body in the temporary Store archive.
TestProviderScript emitted a destructive restore-cloud action.
AgentHandler::confirm executed through DesktopAgentOperations and the existing engine restore_cloud path.
Graph readback verified the newly created restored message.
Cleanup deleted the restored message.
The Store restore_operations row was committed and carried a redacted new cloud id.

not_claimed_live: RestoreLocal live proof remains host-fixture based; no personal restored content is recorded.
Invite live proof is intentionally not claimed without a controlled recipient; host tests cover the invite route.
